2604.24819.title: Programming with Data: Test-Driven Data Engineering for Self-Improving LLMs from Raw Corpora
2604.24819.paper_summary: Reliably transferring specialized human knowledge from text into large language models remains a fundamental challenge in artificial intelligence. Fine-tuning on domain corpora has enabled substantial capability gains, but the process operates without feedback: when a model fails on a domain task, there is no method to diagnose what is deficient in the training data, and the only recourse is to add more data indiscriminately. Here we show that when a structured knowledge representation extracted from the source corpus serves as the shared foundation for both training data and evaluation, the complete data-engineering lifecycle maps onto the software development lifecycle in a precise and operative way: training data becomes source code specifying what the model should learn, model training becomes compilation, benchmarking becomes unit testing, and failure-driven data repair becomes debugging. Under this correspondence, model failures decompose into concept-level gaps and reasoning-chain breaks that can be traced back to specific deficiencies in the data and repaired through targeted patches, with each repair cycle producing consistent improvements across model scales and architectures without degrading general capabilities. We formalize this principle as Programming with Data and instantiate it across sixteen disciplines spanning the natural sciences, engineering, biomedicine, and the social sciences, releasing a structured knowledge base, benchmark suite, and training corpus as open resources. By demonstrating that the relationship between training data and model behaviour is structurally traceable and systematically repairable, this work establishes a principled foundation for the reliable engineering of human expertise into language models.
2604.24819.paper_summary_zh: 可靠地將專業人類知識從文本轉移到大型語言模型仍然是人工智慧中的一個基本挑戰。<lb/>在領域語料庫上進行微調已經實現了顯著的能力提升，但這一過程在沒有反饋的情況下運作：當模型在某個領域任務上失敗時，沒有方法可以診斷訓練數據中缺乏什麼，唯一的補救措施就是不加區別地添加更多數據。<lb/>在這裡，我們展示了當從源語料庫提取的結構化知識表示作為訓練數據和評估的共享基礎時，完整的數據工程生命周期與軟體開發生命周期以精確和有效的方式對應：訓練數據成為指定模型應該學習的源代碼，模型訓練成為編譯，基準測試成為單元測試，而基於失敗的數據修復則成為調試。<lb/>在這種對應關係下，模型失敗分解為概念層級的缺口和推理鏈的中斷，這些都可以追溯到數據中的具體缺陷，並通過有針對性的修補進行修復，每個修復循環在模型規模和架構上都產生一致的改進，而不會降低一般能力。<lb/>我們將這一原則形式化為「用數據編程」，並在涵蓋自然科學、工程、生物醫學和社會科學的十六個學科中實現，釋放結構化知識庫、基準套件和訓練語料庫作為開放資源。<lb/>通過展示訓練數據與模型行為之間的關係是結構上可追溯和系統上可修復的，這項工作為將人類專業知識可靠地工程化到語言模型中建立了一個原則性的基礎。
2604.24819.author: Chenkai Pan et.al.
2604.24819.authors: Chenkai Pan, Xinglong Xu, Yuhang Xu, Yujun Wu, Siyuan Li, Jintao Chen, Conghui He, Jingxuan Wei, Cheng Tan
